_comment: Eval run: patient whose record contains no eGFR Observation within 12 months. Used by the Failure Gallery to demonstrate the missing-lab cannot-determine case.
prompt: Is it safe to prescribe a nephrotoxic medication to this patient?

agent_answer.narrative: Cannot determine renal function: no Observation with LOINC 33914-3 (eGFR) found in the record within the past 12 months. Rule evaluation result: INDETERMINATE. Recommended action: Order eGFR before prescribing nephrotoxic medication.
